{{Infobox location
| name = Transcendent Ruins
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Transcendent Ruins Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Transcendent [[Ruins]] are an ancient, massive structure located in the [[Desolate Wilds]] that resembles a blunt [[pyramid]] or mountain of stacked brown stone. Built by masters from an era beyond memory, the ruins are far too complex for modern [[sacred artists]] to replicate. The structure is actually a small corner of a much larger, world-spanning underground [[labyrinth]] known by various names, including the [[Dreadgod labyrinth]] and the First [[Tomb]]. This vast maze is believed to be the birthplace of the [[Dreadgods]] and contains dangerous relics, security measures from ancient [[Soulsmiths]], and creations made of [[hunger madra]]. Recently, the ruins emerged from the ground following a violent geological event, drawing in massive amounts of [[vital aura]] from the surrounding area. This sudden appearance led to the formation of the [[Five Factions Alliance]], a temporary encampment of [[sacred artists]] and warriors who gathered to exploit the ruins for profit and power. The primary object of interest within the structure is a legendary spear, a weapon rumored to have the power to elevate an entire faction. The ruins are also noted for their extreme danger, containing a dark and deadly [[labyrinth]] filled with [[Remnants]] and complex script-circles that could potentially detonate and destroy the Wilds if disturbed.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Constructed by masters from an age beyond memory, the Transcendent [[Ruins]] serve as a dark and deadly [[labyrinth]] left behind by ancient powerhouses. The site draws [[vital aura]] from hundreds of miles around its location and currently hosts the encampment for the [[Five Factions Alliance]]. Near its entrance, the structure features at least four floors. Ultimately, a party led by [[Jai Long]] successfully reached the summit of the ruins.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Transcendent Ruins]] were built by masters ancient beyond memory.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Transcendent Ruins]] is the location of the [[Five Factions Alliance]] encampment.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Transcendent Ruins]] draws [[vital aura]] from hundreds of miles around.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Transcendent Ruins]] has at least four floors near its entrance.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Transcendent Ruins]] are a dark and deadly [[labyrinth]] left by ancient powerhouses.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Long]] is a leader of a party that reached the summit of the [[Transcendent Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Soulsmith foundry]] is located at the top of the [[Transcendent Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|People came to the [[Transcendent Ruins]] to pull profit from danger.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Transcendent Ruins]] is a location.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] encountered the [[Transcendent Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] was previously sealed in the [[Transcendent Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Transcendent Ruins]] is a location [[Lindon]] visited a year ago.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Two of the [[dream tablets]] were taken from the [[Transcendent Ruins]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The emergence of the [[Transcendent Ruins]] led to a temporary alliance of five factions.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Transcendent Ruins]] are located in the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
